req.title: Interest accrual (boundary variant)
req.statement: A savings account shall accrue interest daily using the tier rate and credit interest monthly on the last business day. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-041 mandates daily interest accrual using tier rates, monthly crediting on the last business day, and correct boundary behaviour at min/max thresholds. The test suite covers: (1) a positive EP case where a mid-tier balance accrues and credits correctly; (2) a negative NEG case where a reconciliation variance is detected and reported; (3) a BVA boundary case at the exact minimum tier threshold; (4) a BVA boundary case at the exact maximum tier threshold; (5) a STC case verifying state transitions from ACCRUING to CREDITED. Each test is self-contained via fixtures that create and teardown account state, posts to /cron/interest, and asserts ledger outcomes deterministically.

tests.name: test_monthly_interest_credited_mid_tier_balance
preconditions: A savings account exists with a mid-tier balance (e.g. 5000.00)
Daily accruals have been posted for the full month
Today is the last business day of the month
actions: Seed account via <fixture: seed_savings_account> with balance=5000.00 and tier='MID'
Seed daily accruals for the month via <helper_fn: seed_daily_accruals>
POST /cron/interest with valid cron auth header
expected: HTTP 200 returned
Response body contains account_id with status='CREDITED'
Ledger entry of type 'INTEREST_CREDIT' exists for the account
Credited amount equals sum of daily accruals for the period
trace: R-FIN-041: interest credited monthly on last business day
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
CRON_ENDPOINT = f"{BASE_URL}/cron/interest"
CRON_HEADERS = {"X-Cron-Auth": "<cron_secret>"}


def test_monthly_interest_credited_mid_tier_balance(
    seed_savings_account, seed_daily_accruals, fetch_ledger_entry, cleanup_account
):
    account_id = seed_savings_account(balance=5000.00, tier="MID")
    expected_interest = seed_daily_accruals(account_id=account_id, tier="MID", balance=5000.00)

    response = requests.post(CRON_ENDPOINT, headers=CRON_HEADERS)
    assert response.status_code == 200

    payload = response.json()
    credited = [r for r in payload["results"] if r["account_id"] == account_id]
    assert len(credited) == 1
    assert credited[0]["status"] == "CREDITED"

    ledger = fetch_ledger_entry(account_id=account_id, entry_type="INTEREST_CREDIT")
    assert ledger is not None
    assert abs(ledger["amount"] - expected_interest) < 0.01

    cleanup_account(account_id)

tests.name: test_reconciliation_variance_reported_on_accrual_mismatch
preconditions: A savings account exists with deliberately corrupted accrual records (sum does not match recomputed amount)
Today is the last business day of the month
actions: Seed account via <fixture: seed_savings_account> with balance=3000.00 and tier='LOW'
Seed corrupted daily accruals via <helper_fn: seed_corrupted_accruals> that introduce a variance
POST /cron/interest with valid cron auth header
expected: HTTP 200 returned (job completes)
Response body contains account_id with status='VARIANCE_REPORTED'
Reconciliation record created with non-zero variance_amount
No INTEREST_CREDIT ledger entry written for the account
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
CRON_ENDPOINT = f"{BASE_URL}/cron/interest"
CRON_HEADERS = {"X-Cron-Auth": "<cron_secret>"}


def test_reconciliation_variance_reported_on_accrual_mismatch(
    seed_savings_account, seed_corrupted_accruals,
    fetch_ledger_entry, fetch_reconciliation_record, cleanup_account
):
    account_id = seed_savings_account(balance=3000.00, tier="LOW")
    seed_corrupted_accruals(account_id=account_id, variance=99.99)

    response = requests.post(CRON_ENDPOINT, headers=CRON_HEADERS)
    assert response.status_code == 200

    payload = response.json()
    results = [r for r in payload["results"] if r["account_id"] == account_id]
    assert len(results) == 1
    assert results[0]["status"] == "VARIANCE_REPORTED"

    recon = fetch_reconciliation_record(account_id=account_id)
    assert recon is not None
    assert recon["variance_amount"] != 0

    ledger = fetch_ledger_entry(account_id=account_id, entry_type="INTEREST_CREDIT")
    assert ledger is None

    cleanup_account(account_id)

tests.name: test_interest_accrual_at_exact_minimum_tier_threshold
preconditions: Tier boundary: minimum balance for MID tier is exactly 1000.00
Daily accruals seeded using MID tier rate
Today is the last business day of the month
actions: Seed account via <fixture: seed_savings_account> with balance=1000.00 and tier='MID'
Seed daily accruals via <helper_fn: seed_daily_accruals> at MID tier rate
POST /cron/interest with valid cron auth header
expected: HTTP 200 returned
Account credited using MID tier rate (not LOW tier rate)
Ledger entry amount equals MID-tier computed interest for 1000.00
Status is 'CREDITED'
trace: R-FIN-041: boundary behaviour at exact min threshold
R-FIN-041: tier rate applied correctly at threshold
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
CRON_ENDPOINT = f"{BASE_URL}/cron/interest"
CRON_HEADERS = {"X-Cron-Auth": "<cron_secret>"}
MIN_MID_TIER_BALANCE = 1000.00


def test_interest_accrual_at_exact_minimum_tier_threshold(
    seed_savings_account, seed_daily_accruals,
    fetch_ledger_entry, get_tier_rate, cleanup_account
):
    account_id = seed_savings_account(balance=MIN_MID_TIER_BALANCE, tier="MID")
    expected_interest = seed_daily_accruals(
        account_id=account_id, tier="MID", balance=MIN_MID_TIER_BALANCE
    )

    response = requests.post(CRON_ENDPOINT, headers=CRON_HEADERS)
    assert response.status_code == 200

    payload = response.json()
    results = [r for r in payload["results"] if r["account_id"] == account_id]
    assert results[0]["status"] == "CREDITED"
    assert results[0]["tier_applied"] == "MID"

    ledger = fetch_ledger_entry(account_id=account_id, entry_type="INTEREST_CREDIT")
    assert abs(ledger["amount"] - expected_interest) < 0.01

    cleanup_account(account_id)

import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
CRON_ENDPOINT = f"{BASE_URL}/cron/interest"
CRON_HEADERS = {"X-Cron-Auth": "<cron_secret>"}
MAX_HIGH_TIER_BALANCE = 100000.00


def test_interest_accrual_at_exact_maximum_tier_threshold(
    seed_savings_account, seed_daily_accruals,
    fetch_ledger_entry, cleanup_account
):
    account_id = seed_savings_account(balance=MAX_HIGH_TIER_BALANCE, tier="HIGH")
    expected_interest = seed_daily_accruals(
        account_id=account_id, tier="HIGH", balance=MAX_HIGH_TIER_BALANCE
    )

    response = requests.post(CRON_ENDPOINT, headers=CRON_HEADERS)
    assert response.status_code == 200

    payload = response.json()
    results = [r for r in payload["results"] if r["account_id"] == account_id]
    assert results[0]["status"] == "CREDITED"
    assert results[0]["tier_applied"] == "HIGH"

    ledger = fetch_ledger_entry(account_id=account_id, entry_type="INTEREST_CREDIT")
    assert abs(ledger["amount"] - expected_interest) < 0.01

    cleanup_account(account_id)

tests.name: test_account_transitions_from_accruing_to_credited_state
preconditions: Account is in ACCRUING state after daily accrual job has run
Today is the last business day of the month
No prior INTEREST_CREDIT entry exists for current month
actions: Seed account via <fixture: seed_savings_account> with balance=7500.00 and tier='MID', state='ACCRUING'
Confirm account state is 'ACCRUING' via <helper_fn: fetch_account_state>
POST /cron/interest with valid cron auth header
Fetch updated account state via <helper_fn: fetch_account_state>
expected: Pre-job state is 'ACCRUING'
HTTP 200 returned
Post-job state is 'CREDITED'
Exactly one INTEREST_CREDIT ledger entry exists for the current month
trace: R-FIN-041: interest credited monthly on last business day
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
CRON_ENDPOINT = f"{BASE_URL}/cron/interest"
CRON_HEADERS = {"X-Cron-Auth": "<cron_secret>"}


def test_account_transitions_from_accruing_to_credited_state(
    seed_savings_account, seed_daily_accruals,
    fetch_account_state, fetch_ledger_entries, cleanup_account
):
    account_id = seed_savings_account(balance=7500.00, tier="MID", state="ACCRUING")
    seed_daily_accruals(account_id=account_id, tier="MID", balance=7500.00)

    pre_state = fetch_account_state(account_id=account_id)
    assert pre_state == "ACCRUING"

    response = requests.post(CRON_ENDPOINT, headers=CRON_HEADERS)
    assert response.status_code == 200

    post_state = fetch_account_state(account_id=account_id)
    assert post_state == "CREDITED"

    ledger_entries = fetch_ledger_entries(
        account_id=account_id, entry_type="INTEREST_CREDIT", period="CURRENT_MONTH"
    )
    assert len(ledger_entries) == 1

    cleanup_account(account_id)
